programme.sub-title: Halloween II: The Return Of Leon
programme.desc: Leon, a runaway, returns just as Harry's putting the finishing touches on his annual Halloween party.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Dan collapses when he returns to work too soon after having an operation.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Dan (John Larroquette) slips into a coma after an amorous former girlfriend (Leslie Bevis) pays him a visit in the hospital.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: While Harry is away, the replacement judge offers Dan a bribe.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: A replacement judge (Ann Turkel) jails Christine on contempt charges.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: A minor earthquake leaves Dan, Roz and two sumo wrestlers trapped in an elevator.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: While Harry (Harry Anderson) is attempting to help a South Pacific princess avoid an arranged marriage, her brother pursues Christine (Markie Post). Jeanne Mori guest stars.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: New Year's Eve in the courtroom finds the judge dealing with a diapered "Mr. 1987" and an escaped convict who's trying to get to Times Square.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: A woman disrupts the court proceedings to confess to murdering her husband, while Dan decides to become a donor for a sperm bank.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Depressed over their financial problems, Mac (Charlie Robinson) decides to leave Quon Le (Denise Kumagai).

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Christine shocks her coworkers when she announces that she is getting married.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Harry and the courtroom staff have until midnight to decide 200 cases.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Dan faces the possibility of undergoing a rabies test after a stray dog bites him.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Harry and Dan try to impress Christine's friend. Guest appearance by Mel Torme.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Christine's boss (Michael Gross) is accused of sexual harassment.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Dan's wild life has finally caught up to him: he's been served a paternity suit. Bull, meanwhile, has decided to run for bailiff shop steward.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Harry tries to administer the oath of citizenship to Quon Le before she gives birth.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Through connections Mac gets advance notice about the new judges list and discovers that Christine is one of the new appointees.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: While Christine's (Markie Post) being sworn in as the new judge, Harry (Harry Anderson) plans a colossal stunt.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Christine (Markie Post) assumes her new role as a judge; Harry (Harry Anderson) prepares to launch his incredible stunt.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: While attempting to perform his stunt on the Brooklyn Bridge, Harry (Harry Anderson) is confronted by a man who intends to commit suicide. With Richard Frank and Kenneth Tigar.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Bull has a near-death experience and insists God spoke to him.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: After Roz and her boyfriend break up Christine decides to help Roz recover, so they go out together to one of Roz's favorite hang-outs: a male strip club.

programme.desc: When her husband has a mental breakdown and goes missing, a woman and her young son set out to find him on the streets, sparking a movement of compassion towards those in need and inspiring a city.

programme.title: Norm Geisler: Not Qualified
programme.desc: An illiterate farm boy asks why Christianity is true, and no one seems to have the answers. His journey to finding those answers leads him to become a worldwide leader who affects the Christian faith in a mighty way.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Braving the Big Battle with the Baroness
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy phrases crazy challenges, random things you can do in 3 minutes to make your life awesome. It's the Blello Show! Let's go!

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe. A blend of flying, exploring, construction and renovations, camp life, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Join Jeni and her friends as they travel to northern Michigan in the middle of winter. The focus of this series is to learn more about God's character through great women of the bible.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.sub-title: The Power of Good: Ian Warren
programme.desc: Thinking that you need to be great, before you start to do good is a misguided mindset. When people engage in doing good as a business mindset, it leads to success, including better financial outcomes.

programme.title: The Grief Journey
programme.desc: The Grief Journey centres around a diverse group of individuals who are brought together by their mutual desire to heal. Each member of the class has experienced a profound loss and each individual's story parallels the parables of Jesus.

programme.title: Always Good News
programme.desc: Monthly update from the Billy Graham Evangelistic Association. Travel around the globe to Estonia, Colombia and Taiwan with Franklin Graham as they witness the impact and change in lives as the host the Festival of Hope.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Gary Kent has produced documentaries on subjects including the Bible, prophecy, events, places & natural health. His passion is to share the news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Win Over Discouragement Depression And Burnout Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of grace, helping believers understand how blessed, favoured and loved they are by God.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: A group of California Christians present the claims of Christ to unbelievers at Huntington Beach.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: You don't have to believe every thought you think. Join Joyce and friends as they discuss how to stop negative thinking, renew your mind, and win the battle in your thoughts.

programme.title: Sugarcreek Amish Mysteries
programme.desc: After Cheryl's devastating breakup, her aunt offers her an escape from Chicago to the Amish town of Sugarcreek. Struggling, Cheryl uncovers an unsettling secret that could disrupt the small town.

programme.title: Many Beautiful Things
programme.desc: The previously untold story of one of the world's great artists whose name was nearly lost to history. Delve into the complex age of Victorian England to meet Lilias Trotter, a daring young woman who defied all norms.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching on life issues like parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK Theologian, Cambridge Scholar, Pastor and Bible Teacher David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: The Postables embark on a road trip to locate a talented young singer/songwriter hiding from her past. As they track down and reunite the family, Oliver receives a box of letters from his father to help prepare him.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Win Over Discouragement Depression And Burnout Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Go Frills
programme.desc: For lots of original songs and loads of fun, join the Frills family aboard their funky fun tour bus as they have exciting adventures, meet new people and present their awesome live rock show.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Night Owls and Early Birds is a new topical Bible study show from the creators of Owlegories. Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life

programme.title: Everytown Downunder

programme.title: The Good Road

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good

programme.title: Good Morning TVSN
programme.desc: Kick off your mornings with TVSN as we showcase hot products with offer sneak peeks and our lively competitions. Enjoy vibrant and engaging mornings with TVSN!

programme.title: Cordelia St Fashion
programme.desc: It's the No-Age Fashion Revolution: Love the fashion - not limitations! Cordelia St offers stylish pieces for all ages and body types. See the fresh looks with endless versatility here at TVSN.

programme.title: Marcasite Jewellery
programme.desc: Discover the allure of Marcasite Jewellery for premium and affordable creations. A classic from TVSN. Each piece radiates natural sparkle and lustre. Perfect for any occasion day or night.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Join pastor Dr David Jeremiah as he challenges viewers to take hold of the truths of God's Word for themselves and to apply it to the daily circumstances in their own life, by presenting God's truth in clear and practical applications.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham over 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are your thoughts running your life? Joyce and friends show how to "think about what you're thinking"-swap complaints for gratitude, speak Scripture, and choose thoughts that transform everyday life.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Towards Belief
programme.desc: Australian pastor and host, Karl Faase travels to the UK, USA and Australia to interview more than thirty leading authors, speakers and apologists as they seek to defuse the top belief blockers to the Christian faith.

programme.title: A Thousand Tomorrows
programme.desc: Cody and Ali take leaps of faith in each other and their future.

programme.title: What's Cooking with Young & Free
programme.desc: Join Young & Free in the kitchen as they serve up a feast of music videos and a side of laughs.

programme.title: OK TV
programme.desc: Brendon and Cathie have poured their 30 years of experience with kids in schools and in ministry and the great goals of the local church into a energetic show that will engage the next generation.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: TV One Life
programme.desc: Between the humour, music and unfiltered ministry, the message is clear, "God can change your life"! Fasten your seatbelts for this roller coaster ride of a show!

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Three Chairs
programme.desc: A talk show that celebrates the art of good conversation. Hosts grapple with topics including dating, phone addiction, parenting, and gender equality. Three Chairs will make you think and smile.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: The Coulter baby is late, but Faith assures them it's fine. By the time Rosemary goes into labor, the entire town is there to support her. Madeline tries to stay in Hope Valley.

programme.title: Home is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Actor and craftsman Luke Macfarlane alongside designer Oliva Westbrooks bring heart, home, and hope to life-changing renovations - proving that sometimes, the greatest transformations begin from within.

programme.title: HumanKind
programme.desc: In the bustling streets of Sydney, Mel Edmonson is proving that a little dough goes a long way. At Wesley Mission, she's turned her passion for baking into a powerful tool for community support.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: With the rodeo in town, Gary Travis leads a new attempt to unmask the criminals and serve justice.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Jesus calls you by name. Come to him. Luke 19 (Halifax 1979).

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Present Help In Times Of Trouble Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching on life issues like parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are your thoughts running your life? Joyce and friends show how to "think about what you're thinking"-swap complaints for gratitude, speak Scripture, and choose thoughts that transform everyday life.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It
programme.desc: Lindsey travels to Ireland to acquire land for a resort. She decides to enter the town's matchmaking festival to prove her investment in the community and win over a handsome local.

programme.title: Raising Global Citizens
programme.desc: After news that their dear friend had passed away, the Primus Family decide to give up their busy life in New York to journey around the world.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: In today's episode, Peter Mortlock teaches on the topic of sacrifice. He shares how the church is built on sacrifice through Jesus and that through sacrifice comes great things.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: Jesus prays for oneness among believers in John 17. Pastor Harrison Conley explores how unity doesn't mean uniformity in this examination of Christ's prayer for His followers.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham over 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Present Help In Times Of Trouble Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.sub-title: Sheerluck Holmes and the Golden Ruler
programme.desc: Plenty of fun, adventures and silly songs with Bob the Tomato, Larry the Cucumber and all the Veggie Tales gang. Join them as they share stories from the Bible and learn about God who loves them.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Set Free to Follow God Pt25
programme.desc: God's rescue of His people from slavery is a model for every act of salvation. His interest is not merely in rescuing people, but to bring them into a life-giving relationship to renew the whole world.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as Nick and Yvette Wynne, the motorcycle missionaries, traverse 20 000 km in 3 months riding around Australia.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration. Which direction are you heading?

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey arrive in Puerto Rico ready to sight see, learn how to make cheese and are serenaded by some locals. Jeni also talks about the characteristics of love found in 1 Corinthians, beginning with patience.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Johannes Gutenberg - Weapon of Mass Distribution
programme.desc: Gutenberg single-handedly helped take the world into the modern era, but at the same time the world's most dangerous resource could now spread at unprecedented speed.

programme.title: Good Morning TVSN
programme.desc: Kick off your mornings with TVSN as we showcase hot products with offer sneak peeks and our lively competitions. Enjoy vibrant and engaging mornings with TVSN!

programme.title: Rainbow Pearls
programme.desc: Experience the enchanting beauty of these pearls. Each one showcasing a stunning spectrum of colours. These unique gems bring a playful elegance to your jewellery collection. Perfect for any occasion.

programme.title: Pilates Pro Chair
programme.desc: Low impact workout delivers results without the aches and pains from lifting weights and running on treadmills. Does this sound like you? It's time you try the Pilates Pro Chair!

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Sister Religions?
programme.desc: In the midst of conflict in the Middle East, featuring interviews with Bishop Michael Nazir-Ali, Rev Dr Mark Durie and Elizabeth Kendal, explores the relationship between Christianity, Judaism and Islam.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to conquer fear? On today's program, Joyce looks at different fears we face and how God helps us overcome them.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: The Coulter baby is late, but Faith assures them it's fine. By the time Rosemary goes into labor, the entire town is there to support her. Madeline tries to stay in Hope Valley.

programme.title: Home is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Actor and craftsman Luke Macfarlane alongside designer Oliva Westbrooks bring heart, home, and hope to life-changing renovations - proving that sometimes, the greatest transformations begin from within.

programme.title: Three Chairs
programme.desc: A talk show celebrating the art of good conversation. Hosts grapple with topics including dating, phone addiction, parenting, and gender equality; making viewers think and smile.

programme.title: Dot Conner: Webtective
programme.desc: Follows an inquisitive young teenager as she investigates questions about faith as if she is a detective solving a mystery. Dot's cases unfold through the lens of social media and technology.

programme.title: Little Worship Company
programme.desc: Hal, Mr and Mrs Looyah present this Bible- and worship-based series. For children up to 7 years old, SLEEPY TIME winds little ones down for a happy, peaceful bedtime, watched over by their wonderful Heavenly Father.

programme.title: Owlegories
programme.desc: Owlegories is an animated series that follows a group of student owls as they travel on adventures learning about nature, faith, and God!

programme.title: Superbook
programme.desc: Superbook teaches children timeless moral truths and life lessons through the captivating, Bible-based adventures of two time-traveling children and their robot friend.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: TV4DADs
programme.desc: TV4DADS is a television series dedicated to fathers and father figures around the world. This exciting series features solid teaching, fun and adventure! In season three, the team head to Alaska for the ultimate Dad's adventure.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Mike explores the ups and downs of San Francisco on a classic cable car and digs into a crab feast fit for King Neptune.

programme.title: A Thousand Tomorrows

programme.desc: This is a story about the cultural evolution of the Sydney beachside suburb of Maroubra and the social struggle of its youth - the tattooed and much maligned surf tribe known as the Bra Boys.

programme.title: The New Rijksmuseum
programme.desc: Chronicles the design of a new entrance to the Rijksmuseum Museum and complete rebuild of the interior. It documents the multiple crises which slow the project's progress until the institution reopened.

programme.title: Shipping the World
programme.desc: A look at the global shipping industry, that is responsible for moving ninety percent of everything that is produced or consumed in the modern world.

programme.title: Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Texas freeways are vast and fast, with heavy trucks, drunk drivers, and extreme weather combining to create some of America's deadliest roadways.

programme.title: Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: India's chaotic roads teem with overloaded trucks, motorbikes, and animals, where poor infrastructure and congestion make survival a daily gamble.

programme.title: Collingwood: From the Inside Out
programme.desc: An account of the Collingwood football club's quest to transform themselves in the 2018 season, after five years of declining results.

programme.title: Machines
programme.desc: Director Rahul Jain presents an intimate, observantly portrayal of the rhythm of life and work in a gigantic textile factory in Gujarat, India.

programme.title: Iyengar: The Man, Yoga, The Student's Jo
programme.desc: Famously-reclusive yogi BKS Iyengar is the creator of a form of yoga credited by many as life-transforming. In his 90s, Iyengar demonstrates extraordinary feats of flexibility and discipline.

programme.title: Kurt Vonnegut: Unstuck in Time
programme.desc: The feature documentary, the first of its kind on Vonnegut, is a deep, immersive dive into the author's life and work, as well as the 25-year friendship with the filmmaker who set out to document it.

programme.title: Women Make Film
programme.desc: Cinema as a kind of time machine as shown by Lynne Ramsay, Kinuyo Tanaka, Sarah Polley and Alice Rohrwacher.

programme.title: The Dog Doc
programme.desc: Combining conventional veterinary training with cutting edge alternative therapies, Dr. Goldstein and his colleagues offer hope to previously hopeless animals (and their owners).

programme.title: My 600-Lb Life

programme.desc: Harry's guardian angel (Mel Torme) shows him how judicial life would be if he left the bench. With Harry Anderson, John Larroquette.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Dan (John Larroquette) suffers from insomnia caused by a guilty conscience; Bull (Richard Moll) wins a cereal sweepstakes. Larry Linville guest stars.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.sub-title: With A Little Help From My Friends
programme.desc: Roz (Marsha Warfield) unwillingly joins Christine (Markie Post) at her singles support group and regrets every minute of it. With Harry Anderson.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Mac (Charlie Robinson) gets his college degree and a job offer from another judge; Dan (John Larroquette) hires a butler. Stars Harry Anderson.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: A magazine votes Harry (Harry Anderson) one of New York's 10 most interesting men. With Markie Post and John Larroquette.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Christine's (Markie Post) ex-husband Tony (Ray Aruzzo) disrupts her blossoming romance with Harry (Harry Anderson). With John Larroquette.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Harry is arrested after spying on Christine and Tony in the park; Dan is swindled out of his "Phil's Foundation" funds.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: The replacement (Gilbert Gottfried) for Dan (John Larroquette) is even more objectionable; Harry and Christine (Harry Anderson, Markie Post) face breaking up.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Dan, costumed as the "Phantom of the Courthouse," hides out in the subterranean levels of the building.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.sub-title: My Life As A Dog Lawyer
programme.desc: Dan (John Larroquette) is humiliated by appearing in dog court when he returns to work. With Harry Anderson.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Roz (Marsha Warfield) is shocked when her long-lost husband (Roger E. Mosley) arrives asking for a divorce. Guest star: Bever-Leigh Banfield.

programme.title: County Rescue

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert

programme.title: Moms' Night Out

programme.title: Comedy All-Stars

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Present Help In Times Of Trouble Pt 3 of 4

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Billy Graham teaches about that still small voice. Mark 6 (Memphis 1978).

programme.title: Impact for Life

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to do it afraid? On today's show, be encouraged to face the fear in your life, knowing that God is always with you.

programme.title: Dealing with Depression

programme.title: Moms' Night Out
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a long-needed mums' night out. But in order to enjoy high heels, adult conversation and food not served in a paper bag, they need their husbands to watch the kids for three hours.

programme.title: Miracle Matt

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, relatable and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible, their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: David Jeremiah

programme.title: The Catholic Guy

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: A group of California Christians present the claims of Christ to unbelievers at Huntington Beach.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes

programme.title: For The Love of Jewellery Day Begins!

programme.title: Glamorous GOLD
programme.desc: Discover elevated styles in fine gold jewellery. Featuring chic cuts with style pieces and sets. Sophisticated and elegant pieces tell a unique story of luxury and glamour.

programme.title: Pink Tourmaline
programme.desc: Presenting the beauty of Pink Tourmaline. Its vibrant colour and stunning sparkle make it an excellent addition to any jewellery collection. Perfect for that touch of elegance and style.

programme.title: Good Guys Doing Good
programme.desc: Tim Bisagno sets out on a journey across the USA to find men of God serving the Lord in adventurous and unique ways. Follow Tim as he travels, participates, laughs, cries, honours and showcases Good Guys doing Gods work!

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Jared Cooke's story depicts how his past addiction led him down a dark path. His redemption and recovery from these learned and highly reinforcing behaviour can be overcome with a willingness to do the work and accepting help.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: HumanKind
programme.desc: In the bustling streets of Sydney, Mel Edmonson is proving that a little dough goes a long way. At Wesley Mission, she's turned her passion for baking into a powerful tool for community support.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Charles Babbage - The TRUE Father of Modern Computing
programme.desc: Charles Babbage's brilliant mind was way ahead of its time. Babbage invented a fully functional mechanical calculator that became the foundation of the modern-day computer.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a long-needed mums' night out. But in order to enjoy high heels, adult conversation and food not served in a paper bag, they need their husbands to watch the kids for three hours.

programme.title: Bernie the Dolphin 2
programme.desc: The kids are thrilled that Bernie has come back. But so has their old enemy Winston, who's about to kidnap the talented dolphin. Kevin and Holly must rescue their splashy friend before it's too late.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.desc: Exploring answers to life's most difficult questions and recorded on college campus across the United States, Cliffe Knechtle engages with students and professors, to give real answers to questions about Christianity.

programme.title: Dream Moms
programme.desc: Two moms whose Broadway dreams got deferred, enter a TV talent show competition together and learn that it's never too late to become what or who you want to be.

programme.title: Significance
programme.desc: This documentary aims to unpack the idea of 'significance' through thought provoking conversations. Join our special guests including Eric Metaxas, Lorna Dueck and Karl Faase and hear how their experiences allowed them find truth.

programme.title: Good Guys Doing Good
programme.desc: Tim Bisagno sets out on a journey across the USA to find men of God serving the Lord in adventurous and unique ways. Follow Tim as he travels, participates, laughs, cries, honours and showcases Good Guys doing Gods work!

programme.title: The Divine Adventure
programme.desc: Are you looking for God's best for your life? Do you have a plan for getting there? Twelve deeply practical and intensely personal, powerful spiritual disciplines that will deepen your intimacy with God.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.sub-title: The Man In The Iron Booty

programme.title: All Hail King Julien

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.sub-title: El Apasionado Negocio de la Ninera
programme.desc: Frederic makes a play to take over the town's babysitters by instituting 'senior sitting'.

programme.desc: When Frederic Estes creates the cutest plushy ever that is the hottest toy in town, the field team must destroy the last remaining one but are powerless against its cuteness.

programme.sub-title: Once Upon A Girl Day / Cop College
programme.desc: Tip and Oh join Chelsea and Apple for a "Girls Day"/When the Chicago cops discover that Kyle has been policing without a humans badge, they send him to Copy College.

programme.desc: Oh wants to get back in touch with his Boov roots/When Oh decides he needs to be more independent, he moves into Elrod's old apartment.

programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Abysmal Altercation of the Abominable Altitooth

programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Bizarre Bout of the Beastly Barfilisk
programme.desc: Harold and George don't ask for much, just a fun scavenger hunt that doesn't include doing Krupp's errands. Careful what you wish for, fellas.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Monstrous Mayhem of the Massive Melviathan
